---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-title-block,#title-block-header{display:none!important}
body,html{margin:0;padding:0;overflow-x:hidden;background:#08111c}
#quarto-content,#quarto-document-content,.page-layout-full,
main.content,.quarto-container{max-width:100%!important;padding:0!important;margin:0!important}

.navbar{
  background:#08111c!important;
  border-bottom:none!important;
  box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08),0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.35)!important;
  padding:.6rem 2rem!important;
}
.navbar-brand,.navbar-brand:hover{color:#fff!important;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem}
.navbar .nav-link{color:rgba(255,255,255,.72)!important;font-weight:500;font-size:.92rem}
.navbar .nav-link:hover,.navbar .nav-link.active{color:#10b981!important}
.navbar-nav .dropdown-menu{background:#141c28!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)!important;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.45)!important}
.navbar-nav .dropdown-item{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)!important}
.navbar-nav .dropdown-item:hover{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12)!important;color:#fff!important}
.quarto-search-button{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)!important}

.hero{
  width:100vw;
  margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);
  min-height:100vh;
  position:relative;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  justify-content:flex-end;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.hero-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:url('images/bogota-night.png');
  background-size:cover;
  background-position:center 30%;
  z-index:0;
}
.hero-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(to bottom,
      rgba(6,12,24,.12) 0%,
      rgba(6,12,24,.28) 24%,
      rgba(6,12,24,.66) 58%,
      rgba(6,12,24,.92) 82%,
      rgba(6,12,24,1) 100%);
  z-index:1;
}
.hero-body{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  padding:0 80px 58px;
  max-width:1080px;
}
.hero-eyebrow{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.52);
  font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;
  text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:18px;
}
.hero-eyebrow::before{
  content:'';display:block;width:24px;height:1.5px;background:#10b981;
}
.hero-title{
  font-size:clamp(3.1rem,6vw,5.8rem);
  font-weight:800;color:#fff;
  line-height:1.02;margin:0 0 18px;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
}
.hero-title span{color:#10b981}
.hero-sub{
  font-size:1.08rem;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.76);
  line-height:1.82;
  max-width:760px;
  margin-bottom:22px;
}
.hero-question{
  max-width:820px;
  font-size:1rem;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
  line-height:1.8;
  margin-bottom:38px;
}
.hero-question strong{color:#10b981;font-weight:700}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.hbtn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  width:220px;height:52px;
  border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;font-size:.92rem;
  text-decoration:none!important;transition:all .2s;
  box-sizing:border-box;letter-spacing:.2px;
}
.hbtn-solid{background:#10b981;color:#fff!important;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(16,185,129,.36)}
.hbtn-solid:hover{background:#059669;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(16,185,129,.42)}
.hbtn-border{background:transparent;color:#fff!important;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35)}
.hbtn-border:hover{border-color:#10b981;color:#10b981!important}

.hero-tags{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  padding:0 80px 42px;
}
.hero-tag{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;
  text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:999px;
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
}

.stat-strip{
  width:100vw;
  margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);
  background:#0d1724;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  display:flex;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.stat-item{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  padding:22px 52px;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}
.stat-item:last-child{border-right:none}
.stat-num{font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;color:#fff;line-height:1}
.stat-num.accent{color:#10b981}
.stat-lbl{
  font-size:.68rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.42);
  text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:6px
}

.fw{width:100vw;margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%)}
.fw-pad{padding:82px 80px}
.inner{max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto}

.eyebrow{
  font-size:.68rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#10b981;margin-bottom:10px;
}
.sec-h{
  font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3vw,2.7rem);
  font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin:0 0 14px;line-height:1.15
}
.sec-h.dark{color:#0d1f2d}
.sec-p{
  font-size:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.58);
  line-height:1.82;max-width:820px
}
.sec-p.dark{color:#4b6a6a}

.problem-sec{background:#101926}
.problem-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1.15fr .95fr;
  gap:28px;
  margin-top:40px;
}
.problem-card{
  background:#172233;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:28px 24px;
}
.problem-card h3{
  font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin:0 0 12px;
}
.problem-card p{
  font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);line-height:1.8;margin:0 0 12px;
}
.problem-card p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.problem-list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0}
.problem-list li{
  position:relative;
  padding:9px 0 9px 18px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.64);
  font-size:.87rem;
  line-height:1.7;
}
.problem-list li::before{
  content:'•';
  position:absolute;left:0;top:8px;
  color:#10b981;font-size:1rem;
}

.story-sec{background:#08111c}
.story-shell{
  margin-top:38px;
  background:#0f1828;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:16px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.story-top{
  padding:28px 28px 20px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}
.story-flow{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:0;
}
.story-step{
  padding:28px 24px 26px;
  position:relative;
  background:#111b2d;
}
.story-step:nth-child(2){background:#122033}
.story-step:nth-child(3){background:#13253a}
.story-step:not(:last-child)::after{
  content:'→';
  position:absolute;
  right:-12px;
  top:28px;
  z-index:2;
  width:24px;height:24px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:#10b981;
  color:#fff;
  font-size:.82rem;
  font-weight:800;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 6px #0f1828;
}
.story-step-num{
  display:inline-flex;
  width:26px;height:26px;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(16,185,129,.14);
  color:#10b981;
  font-size:.75rem;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
.story-step h3{
  font-size:1rem;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#fff;
  margin:0 0 10px;
}
.story-step p{
  font-size:.86rem;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.58);
  line-height:1.76;
  margin:0 0 12px;
}
.story-mini{
  list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0
}
.story-mini li{
  font-size:.8rem;
  color:rgba(16,185,129,.86);
  padding:3px 0 3px 15px;
  position:relative;
  line-height:1.6;
}
.story-mini li::before{
  content:'→';
  position:absolute;left:0;font-size:.72rem;opacity:.7;
}

.module-sec{background:#0b1421}
.module-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:22px;
  margin-top:40px;
}
.module-card{
  background:#121d2f;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:28px 24px;
  transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;
}
.module-card:hover{
  transform:translateY(-4px);
  border-color:rgba(16,185,129,.28);
  box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
}
.module-num{
  font-size:.66rem;
  font-weight:800;
  color:#10b981;
  letter-spacing:2.3px;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
.module-card h3{
  font-size:1rem;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#fff;
  margin:0 0 10px;
  line-height:1.35;
}
.module-role{
  font-size:.82rem;
  color:#10b981;
  font-weight:700;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
.module-card p{
  font-size:.84rem;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.56);
  line-height:1.78;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.module-list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0}
.module-list li{
  font-size:.79rem;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);
  padding:4px 0 4px 15px;
  position:relative;
  line-height:1.62;
}
.module-list li::before{
  content:'•';
  position:absolute;left:0;top:4px;color:#10b981;
}

.use-sec{background:#f8f9fa}
.use-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
  gap:18px;
  margin-top:38px;
}
.use-card{
  background:#fff;
  border:1px solid #e8f0ed;
  border-radius:12px;
  padding:24px 20px;
  transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s;
}
.use-card:hover{
  box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(16,185,129,.08);
  transform:translateY(-4px);
}
.use-num{
  width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;
  background:#0f766e;color:#fff;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.72rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:12px;
}
.use-card h4{
  font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:#0d1f2d;margin:0 0 8px
}
.use-card p{
  font-size:.81rem;color:#4b6a6a;line-height:1.66;margin:0 0 12px
}
.use-link{
  font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#0f766e!important;
  text-decoration:none!important;
}
.use-link:hover{color:#0d3d50!important}

.tech-sec{background:#0f1724}
.tech-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:28px;justify-content:center}
.tech-chip{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);
  font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;
  padding:9px 22px;border-radius:999px;
  transition:all .2s;
}
.tech-chip:hover{
  background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);
  border-color:#10b981;color:#10b981
}

.site-footer{
  width:100vw;margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);
  background:#050c15;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);
  text-align:center;font-size:.73rem;padding:22px 20px;letter-spacing:.5px;
}

@media(max-width:1100px){
  .hero-body,.hero-tags,.fw-pad{padding-left:40px;padding-right:40px}
  .problem-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .story-flow,.module-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .use-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .story-step:not(:last-child)::after{display:none}
  .stat-item{padding:18px 28px}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .hero-body,.hero-tags,.fw-pad{padding-left:24px;padding-right:24px}
  .hero-title{font-size:2.7rem;letter-spacing:-1px}
  .hbtn{width:170px;height:46px;font-size:.86rem}
  .use-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .stat-item{padding:16px 18px}
}
</style>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>

  <div class="hero-body">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">COFINFAD · Visual Analytics · Group 7</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      Colombian Fintech<br>
      <span>Customer</span> Analytics
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      A web-enabled visual analytics application built from 48,723 customer records to support fintech product, CRM, and business teams.
    </p>
    <p class="hero-question">
      <strong>Core question:</strong> How do customer structure, platform behaviour, and service experience relate to retention risk and customer lifetime value?
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="project/proposal.html" class="hbtn hbtn-solid">Start with Proposal</a>
      <a href="https://ligen.shinyapps.io/isss608_vaa_colombianfintech-project-shiny/"
         class="hbtn hbtn-border" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">▶ Launch Shiny App</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-tags">
    <span class="hero-tag">Customer Structure</span>
    <span class="hero-tag">Behaviour &amp; Experience</span>
    <span class="hero-tag">Retention Risk</span>
    <span class="hero-tag">Customer Value</span>
    <span class="hero-tag">Predictive Modelling</span>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="stat-strip">
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">48,723</div><div class="stat-lbl">Customer Records</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">57</div><div class="stat-lbl">Variables</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num accent">3</div><div class="stat-lbl">Analytical Modules</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">20+</div><div class="stat-lbl">Cities</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num accent">R Shiny</div><div class="stat-lbl">Platform</div></div>
</div>

<section class="fw problem-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Project Focus</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h">Built Around One Analytical Direction</h2>
    <p class="sec-p">
      The goal is not simply to display customer metrics. The system is designed to move from understanding the customer base, to diagnosing how customers engage and evaluate the platform, and finally to prioritising retention and value outcomes.
    </p>

    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="problem-card">
        <h3>Why this matters for fintech teams</h3>
        <p>Product and CRM teams need to answer connected questions, not isolated ones. A customer segment is only useful when it can be linked to platform behaviour. Behavioural patterns are only useful when they help explain advocacy, churn risk, or customer value.</p>
        <p>Using the COFINFAD dataset, this project turns customer-level data into a structured decision-support workflow for business users who need interpretable, interactive analysis rather than static reporting.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="problem-card">
        <h3>What the system is built to support</h3>
        <ul class="problem-list">
          <li>Identify who the customers are and how they differ across segments and locations.</li>
          <li>Diagnose which usage and experience indicators actually matter.</li>
          <li>Connect behavioural and service patterns to retention risk and customer lifetime value.</li>
          <li>Support business prioritisation through interactive exploration and predictive modelling.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="fw story-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Storyline</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h">The Storyline Drives the Entire Website</h2>
    <p class="sec-p">
      There is no separate storyboard page in the final website. The storyline is presented here as the main analytical path of the project and the logic that connects all three modules.
    </p>

    <div class="story-shell">
      <div class="story-top">
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;">Progressive analytical journey</h3>
        <p style="margin:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.58);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.8;">
          The system starts with customer structure, moves into behavioural and experience diagnosis, and ends with retention and customer value analysis. Each stage prepares the context for the next one.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="story-flow">
        <div class="story-step">
          <div class="story-step-num">1</div>
          <h3>Customer Structure</h3>
          <p>The first step establishes the analytical foundation. Users explore segment composition, product adoption, transaction behaviour, and geographic patterns to understand what the customer base looks like.</p>
          <ul class="story-mini">
            <li>Who are our customers?</li>
            <li>How are they distributed?</li>
            <li>What early behavioural patterns appear?</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="story-step">
          <div class="story-step-num">2</div>
          <h3>Behaviour &amp; Experience Diagnosis</h3>
          <p>The second step explains how customers interact with the platform and how they evaluate that experience. This layer distinguishes stronger signals from weaker ones and surfaces where friction emerges.</p>
          <ul class="story-mini">
            <li>Which engagement signals matter?</li>
            <li>How does satisfaction relate to advocacy?</li>
            <li>Where does service friction appear?</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="story-step">
          <div class="story-step-num">3</div>
          <h3>Retention Risk &amp; Customer Value</h3>
          <p>The final step moves from explanation to prioritisation. Users examine churn context, value concentration, and predictive CLV modelling to identify which customers matter most for retention and growth.</p>
          <ul class="story-mini">
            <li>Who is more valuable?</li>
            <li>Which groups need attention?</li>
            <li>How well can value be predicted?</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="fw module-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Modules</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h">Three Modules with Three Different Jobs</h2>
    <p class="sec-p">
      The modules are not equal summaries of the same dataset. Each one plays a distinct role in the overall logic of the system: foundation, diagnosis, and prioritisation.
    </p>

    <div class="module-grid">
      <div class="module-card">
        <div class="module-num">MODULE 01</div>
        <h3>Customer Overview &amp; Segmentation</h3>
        <div class="module-role">Role: Foundation layer</div>
        <p>This module introduces the customer base through segment structure, product adoption, transaction behaviour, and city-level pattern discovery. It is the entry point for the rest of the system.</p>
        <ul class="module-list">
          <li>Interactive customer explorer table</li>
          <li>Segment distribution across age groups</li>
          <li>Transaction behaviour by age and segment</li>
          <li>Geographic behavioural clustering</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="module-card">
        <div class="module-num">MODULE 02</div>
        <h3>Customer Engagement &amp; Experience</h3>
        <div class="module-role">Role: Diagnostic bridge</div>
        <p>This module sits between structure and outcomes. It tests how product ownership relates to platform usage, how satisfaction translates into advocacy, and where complaints and support patterns reveal service friction.</p>
        <ul class="module-list">
          <li>Feature usage breadth by product ownership</li>
          <li>Login frequency comparison</li>
          <li>NPS linked to satisfaction and usage</li>
          <li>Complaint and support burden analysis</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="module-card">
        <div class="module-num">MODULE 03</div>
        <h3>Retention Risk &amp; Customer Value</h3>
        <div class="module-role">Role: Prioritisation and modelling layer</div>
        <p>This module extends the analysis to business outcomes. It combines churn context, geographic value patterns, and predictive modelling of customer lifetime value using Linear Regression and Random Forest.</p>
        <ul class="module-list">
          <li>CLV distribution by segment</li>
          <li>Churn comparison across segments</li>
          <li>Geographic value analysis</li>
          <li>Predicted vs actual CLV evaluation</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="fw use-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner">
    <div class="eyebrow" style="color:#0f766e">Explore the Project</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h dark">How to Move Through the Site</h2>
    <p class="sec-p dark">
      The website documents the logic of the system. The Shiny application is where interactive exploration happens. The pages below are arranged to make that transition clear.
    </p>

    <div class="use-grid">
      <div class="use-card">
        <div class="use-num">1</div>
        <h4>Read the Proposal</h4>
        <p>Start with the project framing, dataset scope, and system architecture before going into module-level detail.</p>
        <a href="project/proposal.html" class="use-link">Open Proposal →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="use-card">
        <div class="use-num">2</div>
        <h4>Review the Modules</h4>
        <p>See how the three analytical layers work together and what each one contributes to the full workflow.</p>
        <a href="modules/module_overview.html" class="use-link">Open Modules →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="use-card">
        <div class="use-num">3</div>
        <h4>Launch the Shiny App</h4>
        <p>Use the interactive dashboard to filter customer groups and inspect the main visual analytics views directly.</p>
        <a href="https://ligen.shinyapps.io/isss608_vaa_colombianfintech-project-shiny/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="use-link">Launch App →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="use-card">
        <div class="use-num">4</div>
        <h4>Use the Poster and Guide</h4>
        <p>Refer to the poster for a concise summary and the user guide for step-by-step usage support.</p>
        <a href="user_guide.qmd" class="use-link">Open User Guide →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="fw tech-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner" style="text-align:center">
    <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center;display:flex">Technology</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h">Built With</h2>
    <p class="sec-p" style="margin:0 auto 0">
      CRAN-supported R packages &nbsp;·&nbsp; Shiny on shinyapps.io &nbsp;·&nbsp; Quarto website on Netlify
    </p>
    <div class="tech-grid">
      <span class="tech-chip">R</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">Shiny</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">ggplot2</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">plotly</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">tidyverse</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">DT</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">heatmaply</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">leaflet</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">randomForest</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">Quarto</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  COFINFAD &nbsp;·&nbsp; Colombian Fintech Customer Analytics &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  Group 7 &nbsp;·&nbsp; ISSS608 Visual Analytics &amp; Applications &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2026
</footer>
```
